title: Vendor c/image after EOF heuristic tuning
body:
Test further relaxing the “unexpected EOF” heuristic, with the intent to allow one retry a minute even if we made little progress (in particular, this could help with the failures very soon after the initial connection like https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/17193#issuecomment-1427882541 ).

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body: https://github.com/containers/image/pull/1847 was merged in c/image; so updating this PR to bring it into Podman immediately, hopefully improving the flake situation.
